ValidationRule.description: PKI Queue 'E-Commerce PKI WebTeam' can't be set to be Case Owner.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_055: You are not allowed to assign Cases to the queue 'E-Commerce PKI WebTeam'. Please select appropriate queue based on Owned by Company 'E-Commerce PKI WebTeam (AES)' or 'E-Commerce PKI WebTeam (LSDX)'.
